docs/elnis-usage.md:code-comment:toml:17.source: 只有显式 enabled=false 才禁用该 Elwisp。
docs/elnis-usage.md:code-comment:toml:17.translation: This Elwisp is disabled only when enabled=false is explicitly set.

docs/elnis-usage.md:code-comment:toml:1b.source: handler 执行及响应写出期限；direct 模式可能包含外部 I/O，因此默认较宽松。
docs/elnis-usage.md:code-comment:toml:1b.translation: Timeout for handler execution and response writing; direct mode may involve external I/O, so the default is more lenient.

docs/elnis-usage.md:code-comment:toml:3c.source: Elnis 总开关；false 时不启动 HTTP runtime。
docs/elnis-usage.md:code-comment:toml:3c.translation: Elnis master switch; if false, the HTTP runtime will not start.

docs/elnis-usage.md:code-comment:toml:3e.source: llm 模式后台 worker 数。
docs/elnis-usage.md:code-comment:toml:3e.translation: Number of background workers in LLM mode.

docs/elnis-usage.md:code-comment:toml:46.source: Elwisp 默认启用；只有需要限制 token、覆盖投递策略或禁用时才配置。
docs/elnis-usage.md:code-comment:toml:46.translation: Elwisp is enabled by default; configure it only when you need to limit tokens, override delivery policies, or disable it.

docs/elnis-usage.md:code-comment:toml:51.source: 建议先绑定本地地址，需要暴露时再用反代或内网转发。
docs/elnis-usage.md:code-comment:toml:51.translation: It is recommended to bind to a local address first, and use a reverse proxy or intranet forwarding when exposure is needed.

docs/elnis-usage.md:code-comment:toml:7f.source: 单个 Elvena 请求 body 上限。
docs/elnis-usage.md:code-comment:toml:7f.translation: Request body limit for a single Elvena request.

docs/elnis-usage.md:code-comment:toml:90.source: 外部工具默认允许，此处只禁用指定工具。
docs/elnis-usage.md:code-comment:toml:90.translation: External tools are allowed by default; only specified tools are disabled here.

docs/elnis-usage.md:code-comment:toml:92.source: 默认允许 Elwisp 预加载的 ElBot 内部工具。
docs/elnis-usage.md:code-comment:toml:92.translation: By default, ElBot internal tools preloaded by Elwisp are allowed.

docs/elnis-usage.md:code-comment:toml:a2.source: llm 模式后台队列长度。
docs/elnis-usage.md:code-comment:toml:a2.translation: Background queue length for LLM mode.

docs/elnis-usage.md:code-comment:toml:b0.source: { platform = "telegram" }, # 禁用 telegram 整个平台所有投递。
docs/elnis-usage.md:code-comment:toml:b0.translation: { platform = "telegram" }, # Disable all deliveries for the entire telegram platform.

docs/elnis-usage.md:code-comment:toml:b2.source: 整个请求（含 body）读取期限。
docs/elnis-usage.md:code-comment:toml:b2.translation: Read timeout for the entire request (including body).

docs/elnis-usage.md:code-comment:toml:c2.source: 从系统环境变量或配置目录 .env 读取。
docs/elnis-usage.md:code-comment:toml:c2.translation: Read from system environment variables or the .env file in the configuration directory.

docs/elnis-usage.md:code-comment:toml:e2.translation: Overrides the top-level allowed_tools when present.

docs/elnis-usage.md:list:003001043952716.source: Elwisp 不能绕过 Tool Runtime 和 Security Policy 调用 ElBot 内部工具；
docs/elnis-usage.md:list:003001043952716.translation: Elwisp cannot bypass Tool Runtime and Security Policy to call ElBot internal tools;

docs/elnis-usage.md:list:1cd550c5433eab9.translation: The original token text is not written to logs.

docs/elnis-usage.md:list:1e556fd35e3587b.source: HTTP 超时配置小于等于 0 时使用上述安全默认值，不能用 0 关闭超时。
docs/elnis-usage.md:list:1e556fd35e3587b.translation: When HTTP timeout configurations are less than or equal to 0, the aforementioned safe default values are used; timeouts cannot be disabled by using 0.

docs/elnis-usage.md:list:39d59267ebaab21.translation: __ELBOT_CODE_0__: deliver to a specified platform group chat.

docs/elnis-usage.md:list:4d0d28105262232.source: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 限制哪些 token 可以代表该 Elwisp 投递事件；不写则允许任意已认证 token。
docs/elnis-usage.md:list:4d0d28105262232.translation: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ restricts which tokens can represent the Elwisp to deliver events; if not specified, any authenticated token is allowed.

docs/elnis-usage.md:list:4df54398bc8b153.source: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 只允许 __ELBOT_CODE_1__ 或 __ELBOT_CODE_2__，不影响模型槽位。
docs/elnis-usage.md:list:4df54398bc8b153.translation: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ only allows __ELBOT_CODE_1__ or __ELBOT_CODE_2__, and does not affect model slots.

docs/elnis-usage.md:list:5aa752857d96b5f.source: 非 loopback 地址应放在反向代理后，由代理负责 TLS、连接上限和请求速率限制；应用层超时不能代替这些边界。
docs/elnis-usage.md:list:5aa752857d96b5f.translation: Non-loopback addresses should be placed behind a reverse proxy, with the proxy handling TLS, connection limits, and request rate limiting; application-layer timeouts cannot replace these boundaries.

docs/elnis-usage.md:list:5c6d736596b8e68.source: 外部工具调用由 Elnis 对声明的 endpoint 发起 HTTP JSON POST；外部工具自身负责实际风险边界，Elnis 侧按 low 风险处理。
docs/elnis-usage.md:list:5c6d736596b8e68.translation: External tool calls are initiated by Elnis as HTTP JSON POST requests to the declared endpoint; the external tool itself is responsible for the actual risk boundary, and Elnis handles it as low-risk.

docs/elnis-usage.md:list:62a744b0b6e7b92.translation: Local protocols such as __ELBOT_CODE_0__ are prohibited.

docs/elnis-usage.md:list:72f74d2a2cdd5ca.source: Elwisp 默认启用；没写 __ELBOT_CODE_0__、写了但没写 __ELBOT_CODE_1__、或写了 __ELBOT_CODE_2__ 都会接收。
docs/elnis-usage.md:list:72f74d2a2cdd5ca.translation: Elwisp is enabled by default; it will receive events if __ELBOT_CODE_0__ is not specified, if it is specified but __ELBOT_CODE_1__ is not, or if __ELBOT_CODE_2__ is specified.

docs/elnis-usage.md:list:807392aba7b653e.source: __ELBOT_CODE_0__：投递到所有已启用平台超级管理员，不能同时写 __ELBOT_CODE_1__ 或 __ELBOT_CODE_2__。
docs/elnis-usage.md:list:807392aba7b653e.translation: __ELBOT_CODE_0__: deliver to the superadmins of all enabled platforms; __ELBOT_CODE_1__ or __ELBOT_CODE_2__ cannot be written at the same time.

docs/elnis-usage.md:list:8ae9e28aae0d922.source: 单个 Elwisp 可用 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 禁用指定工具。
docs/elnis-usage.md:list:8ae9e28aae0d922.translation: A single Elwisp can use __ELBOT_CODE_0__ to disable specific tools.

docs/elnis-usage.md:list:8eb172baff6cb1b.source: Elwisp 声明的外部 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 默认允许，并通过 ToolRun 以 __ELBOT_CODE_1__ 形式注入为模型可调用函数名；
docs/elnis-usage.md:list:8eb172baff6cb1b.translation: External __ELBOT_CODE_0__ declared by Elwisp are allowed by default and are injected as model-callable function names in the form of __ELBOT_CODE_1__ via ToolRun;

docs/elnis-usage.md:list:941b47c124f2856.source: direct 模式同样支持 image/file 输出，平台不支持时自动降级为文字描述。
docs/elnis-usage.md:list:941b47c124f2856.translation: Direct mode also supports image/file output; it automatically degrades to a text description if the platform does not support it.

docs/elnis-usage.md:list:962954418322bb5.source: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 只能选择 __ELBOT_CODE_1__、__ELBOT_CODE_2__、__ELBOT_CODE_3__，不能指定任意内部模式名；
docs/elnis-usage.md:list:962954418322bb5.translation: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ can only choose __ELBOT_CODE_1__, __ELBOT_CODE_2__, or __ELBOT_CODE_3__, and cannot specify an arbitrary internal mode name;

docs/elnis-usage.md:list:99267342faabbf9.source: 需要接收 Elvena 事件时请使用 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 或 __ELBOT_CODE_1__。
docs/elnis-usage.md:list:99267342faabbf9.translation: Please use __ELBOT_CODE_0__ or __ELBOT_CODE_1__ when you need to receive Elvena events.

docs/elnis-usage.md:list:9e77000334927a8.source: 只有显式 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 才会禁用对应 Elwisp。
docs/elnis-usage.md:list:9e77000334927a8.translation: Only explicit __ELBOT_CODE_0__ will disable the corresponding Elwisp.

docs/elnis-usage.md:list:a02dcfcfc7aeb5a.translation: __ELBOT_CODE_0__: deliver to a specified platform private chat.

docs/elnis-usage.md:list:af47283fd76be05.source: 当前 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 只适用于 Elnis 与 CLI 同处一个 __ELBOT_CODE_1__ 前台进程，或 service 模式启用 CLI 远程服务端的场景；
docs/elnis-usage.md:list:af47283fd76be05.translation: Currently, __ELBOT_CODE_0__ only applies to scenarios where Elnis and the CLI are in the same __ELBOT_CODE_1__ foreground process, or when the CLI remote server is enabled in service mode;

docs/elnis-usage.md:list:b402ea8c3ed8917.source: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 时不启动 Elnis HTTP runtime。
docs/elnis-usage.md:list:b402ea8c3ed8917.translation: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ will not start the Elnis HTTP runtime.

docs/elnis-usage.md:list:bc6075397e81dca.source: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 可以写多个环境变量名，按顺序尝试。
docs/elnis-usage.md:list:bc6075397e81dca.translation: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ can contain multiple environment variable names, which will be tried in order.

docs/elnis-usage.md:list:c29df2c57475853.source: 顶层 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 是 ElBot 内部工具默认白名单，单个 Elwisp 的 __ELBOT_CODE_1__ 存在时覆盖它。
docs/elnis-usage.md:list:c29df2c57475853.translation: The top-level __ELBOT_CODE_0__ is the default whitelist for ElBot internal tools; it is overridden when __ELBOT_CODE_1__ of an individual Elwisp exists.

docs/elnis-usage.md:list:c4ed0195b6b6e83.source: Elnis 接收后自动下载到 __ELBOT_CODE_0__。
docs/elnis-usage.md:list:c4ed0195b6b6e83.translation: Elnis automatically downloads it to __ELBOT_CODE_0__ upon receipt.

docs/elnis-usage.md:list:ca55d61a6160292.source: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 中的工具名或 Skill 名都会经过 Elnis __ELBOT_CODE_1__ 裁决。
docs/elnis-usage.md:list:ca55d61a6160292.translation: Tool names or Skill names in __ELBOT_CODE_0__ will all undergo Elnis __ELBOT_CODE_1__ adjudication.

docs/elnis-usage.md:list:ce044b9ed5ef1d0.source: 独立 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 进程需连接服务端后才能收到通知。
docs/elnis-usage.md:list:ce044b9ed5ef1d0.translation: Independent __ELBOT_CODE_0__ processes must connect to the server before they can receive notifications.

docs/elnis-usage.md:list:d705c8398c10672.source: 只有 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 或单 Elwisp __ELBOT_CODE_1__ 显式列出的目标会被禁止。
docs/elnis-usage.md:list:d705c8398c10672.translation: Only targets explicitly listed in __ELBOT_CODE_0__ or a single Elwisp __ELBOT_CODE_1__ will be prohibited.

docs/elnis-usage.md:list:ec3ddb6e6198fb8.source: token 名只用于日志和审计，不等同于 Elwisp 身份。
docs/elnis-usage.md:list:ec3ddb6e6198fb8.translation: The token name is used only for logs and audit logs, and is not equivalent to the Elwisp identity.

docs/elnis-usage.md:list:ed2ead06ed2b4af.source: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ URI 仅支持 base64 编码，解码后同样受限。
docs/elnis-usage.md:list:ed2ead06ed2b4af.translation: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ URIs only support base64 encoding and are similarly restricted after decoding.

docs/elnis-usage.md:list:ef07a3cc0f03355.source: 发送到 LLM 时使用原始 URL（多模态模型可直接看图），沙盒保留副本。
docs/elnis-usage.md:list:ef07a3cc0f03355.translation: The original URL is used when sending to the LLM (multimodal models can view images directly), and a copy is kept in the sandbox.

docs/elnis-usage.md:list:f05de9594a7ea18.source: 只写 __ELBOT_CODE_0__：投递到该平台超级管理员。
docs/elnis-usage.md:list:f05de9594a7ea18.translation: Only write __ELBOT_CODE_0__: deliver to the superadmin of that platform.

docs/elnis-usage.md:list:f37c91ec3dffafe.source: token 原文不写入配置，推荐放在系统环境变量或配置目录 __ELBOT_CODE_0__。
docs/elnis-usage.md:list:f37c91ec3dffafe.translation: Do not write the token plaintext into the configuration; it is recommended to place it in system environment variables or the configuration directory __ELBOT_CODE_0__.

docs/elnis-usage.md:list:f5a5eaccc2efc4c.source: 外部工具默认允许；单个 Elwisp 可以用 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 禁用指定外部工具。
docs/elnis-usage.md:list:f5a5eaccc2efc4c.translation: External tools are allowed by default; an individual Elwisp can use __ELBOT_CODE_0__ to disable specific external tools.

docs/elnis-usage.md:list:fc0f75611e8b81f.source: 文件大小受 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 的 __ELBOT_CODE_1__ 限制（默认 100MB）。
docs/elnis-usage.md:list:fc0f75611e8b81f.translation: File size is limited by __ELBOT_CODE_1__ of __ELBOT_CODE_0__ (default 100MB).

docs/elnis-usage.md:list:fc9a2a279e2ae3e.source: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 是 CLI-only 模式，即使 __ELBOT_CODE_1__ 也不会启动 Elnis HTTP runtime；
docs/elnis-usage.md:list:fc9a2a279e2ae3e.translation: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ is CLI-only mode; even with __ELBOT_CODE_1__, the Elnis HTTP runtime will not start;

docs/elnis-usage.md:paragraph:01132ca445.source: 后台 LLM 处理事件后，__ELBOT_CODE_0__ 的 __ELBOT_CODE_1__ 可附带图片/文件路径，Elnis 会在报告发送时一并投递。
docs/elnis-usage.md:paragraph:01132ca445.translation: After the background LLM processes the event, the __ELBOT_CODE_1__ of __ELBOT_CODE_0__ can include image/file paths, which Elnis will deliver together when the report is sent.

docs/elnis-usage.md:paragraph:143cb8eb95.source: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 必须是当前任务工作目录内的相对路径，不能使用绝对路径、__ELBOT_CODE_1__ 或 __ELBOT_CODE_2__。
docs/elnis-usage.md:paragraph:143cb8eb95.translation: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ must be a relative path within the current task working directory; absolute paths, __ELBOT_CODE_1__, or __ELBOT_CODE_2__ cannot be used.

docs/elnis-usage.md:paragraph:164dc12a20.source: HTTP 响应只表示 Elnis 已接收或拒绝请求，不等待 LLM 完成。
docs/elnis-usage.md:paragraph:164dc12a20.translation: The HTTP response only indicates that Elnis has received or rejected the request, and does not wait for the LLM to complete.

docs/elnis-usage.md:paragraph:1f7cad2a0b.source: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 为空时行为不变，非空时优先 segments 渲染，content 作为附加文本。
docs/elnis-usage.md:paragraph:1f7cad2a0b.translation: Behavior remains unchanged when __ELBOT_CODE_0__ is empty; when not empty, segments are rendered preferentially, and content serves as additional text.

docs/elnis-usage.md:paragraph:2fe0efe680.source: direct/record 请求中 __ELBOT_CODE_0__、__ELBOT_CODE_1__、__ELBOT_CODE_2__ 至少提供一个，LLM 模式仍必须提供 __ELBOT_CODE_3__。
docs/elnis-usage.md:paragraph:2fe0efe680.translation: In direct/record requests, at least one of __ELBOT_CODE_0__, __ELBOT_CODE_1__, or __ELBOT_CODE_2__ must be provided; LLM mode still requires __ELBOT_CODE_3__.

docs/elnis-usage.md:paragraph:3992a8029e.source: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 会提供协议说明、配置片段、事件模板、代码脚手架和测试命令；真正写文件或运行命令仍会继续使用对应工具。
docs/elnis-usage.md:paragraph:3992a8029e.translation: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ will provide protocol descriptions, configuration snippets, event templates, code scaffolding, and test commands; actually writing files or running commands will still continue to use the corresponding tools.

docs/elnis-usage.md:paragraph:3b1511c0ed.source: 命中 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 或单 Elwisp __ELBOT_CODE_1__ 时才禁止。
docs/elnis-usage.md:paragraph:3b1511c0ed.translation: It is only prohibited when __ELBOT_CODE_0__ or a single Elwisp __ELBOT_CODE_1__ is hit.

docs/elnis-usage.md:paragraph:4bf90b5417.source: Elnis 默认关闭。启用时先在 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 中声明配置文件入口：
docs/elnis-usage.md:paragraph:4bf90b5417.translation: Elnis is disabled by default. When enabling it, first declare the configuration file entry in __ELBOT_CODE_0__:

docs/elnis-usage.md:paragraph:5a9b0b9287.source: 本文承接 [Elnis 监听枢纽](elnis.md)，讲如何启用 Elnis、配置 Elwisp 策略，并用 Elvena 投递事件。
docs/elnis-usage.md:paragraph:5a9b0b9287.translation: This article follows [Elnis listening hub](elnis.md) and explains how to enable Elnis, configure Elwisp policies, and use Elvena to deliver events.

docs/elnis-usage.md:paragraph:6bedfd1be3.source: 如果想让 ElBot 帮你生成 Elwisp 监听器，可以在 work 模式下向超级管理员会话提出需求，例如：
docs/elnis-usage.md:paragraph:6bedfd1be3.translation: If you want ElBot to help you generate an Elwisp listener, you can submit a request to the superadmin Session in work mode, for example:

docs/elnis-usage.md:paragraph:74d9bfb1c1.source: 禁用配置中的 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 表示禁用该平台所有投递。
docs/elnis-usage.md:paragraph:74d9bfb1c1.translation: Setting __ELBOT_CODE_0__ in the disable configuration means disabling all deliveries for this platform.

docs/elnis-usage.md:paragraph:887cee93ce.source: Elvena v3 支持通过 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 字段发送图片和文件。
docs/elnis-usage.md:paragraph:887cee93ce.translation: Elvena v3 supports sending images and files via the __ELBOT_CODE_0__ field.

docs/elnis-usage.md:paragraph:8db3fb0324.source: 每个 HTTP 请求体必须且只能包含一个 JSON 值，尾随空白允许，尾随第二个 JSON 值或非法内容会返回 __ELBOT_CODE_0__。
docs/elnis-usage.md:paragraph:8db3fb0324.translation: Each HTTP request body must contain exactly one JSON value. Trailing whitespace is allowed, but a trailing second JSON value or illegal content will return __ELBOT_CODE_0__.

docs/elnis-usage.md:paragraph:8f55f10237.translation: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ is reserved as a plain text fallback;

docs/elnis-usage.md:paragraph:a8dc934328.source: Elwisp 可以在 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 中声明期望目标，但最终目标由 Elnis 裁决。
docs/elnis-usage.md:paragraph:a8dc934328.translation: Elwisp can declare the expected target in __ELBOT_CODE_0__, but the final target is decided by Elnis.

docs/elnis-usage.md:paragraph:c27cc1f6d3.source: 如果同一个 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 再次发送，Elnis 会返回 duplicate，不重复分发。
docs/elnis-usage.md:paragraph:c27cc1f6d3.translation: If the same __ELBOT_CODE_0__ is sent again, Elnis will return duplicate and will not redistribute it.

docs/elnis-usage.md:paragraph:c4402f9491.source: 需要正式语义的字段应加入对应 Elvena 协议版本。
docs/elnis-usage.md:paragraph:c4402f9491.translation: Fields requiring formal semantics should be added to the corresponding Elvena protocol version.

docs/elnis-usage.md:paragraph:ddac502e5a.source: 启动 ElBot 后，可以用 curl 测试一个 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 事件：
docs/elnis-usage.md:paragraph:ddac502e5a.translation: After starting ElBot, you can use curl to test a __ELBOT_CODE_0__ event:

docs/elnis-usage.md:paragraph:e2c1b9710c.source: 未知字段会被忽略，不参与协议语义、规范化、事件 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 或审计；
docs/elnis-usage.md:paragraph:e2c1b9710c.translation: Unknown fields will be ignored and will not participate in protocol semantics, normalization, event __ELBOT_CODE_0__, or auditing;

docs/elnis-usage.md:table:01645b79e16b3b.source: direct/record 模式可为空，但 __ELBOT_CODE_0__、__ELBOT_CODE_1__、__ELBOT_CODE_2__ 至少提供一个。
docs/elnis-usage.md:table:01645b79e16b3b.translation: Can be empty in direct/record mode, but at least one of __ELBOT_CODE_0__, __ELBOT_CODE_1__, or __ELBOT_CODE_2__ must be provided.

docs/elnis-usage.md:table:0250510547f02d.source: Elnis LLM 模型槽位，仅支持 __ELBOT_CODE_0__、__ELBOT_CODE_1__、__ELBOT_CODE_2__；未填写或对应槽位未配置时回退到 __ELBOT_CODE_3__。
docs/elnis-usage.md:table:0250510547f02d.translation: Elnis LLM model slot, only supporting __ELBOT_CODE_0__, __ELBOT_CODE_1__, and __ELBOT_CODE_2__; if left blank or the corresponding slot is not configured, it will fall back to __ELBOT_CODE_3__.

docs/elnis-usage.md:table:045a16d4324315.source: 最终仍由 Elnis 裁决。
docs/elnis-usage.md:table:045a16d4324315.translation: The final decision is still made by Elnis.

docs/elnis-usage.md:table:05a363aa4f244a.source: 具体事件源，例如服务名、脚本名、RSS 名。
docs/elnis-usage.md:table:05a363aa4f244a.translation: Specific event source, such as service name, script name, or RSS name.

docs/elnis-usage.md:table:0748071790b55d.source: Elvena v3 动作调用数组。

docs/elnis-usage.md:table:0e88874c152f1e.source: Elwisp 名称，也是来源身份之一；仅允许英文字母、数字、__ELBOT_CODE_0__、__ELBOT_CODE_1__，不允许点号。
docs/elnis-usage.md:table:0e88874c152f1e.translation: Elwisp name, which is also one of the source identities; only English letters, numbers, __ELBOT_CODE_0__, and __ELBOT_CODE_1__ are allowed; dots are not allowed.

docs/elnis-usage.md:table:226a892571e4cb.source: LLM 后台 Session 模式：__ELBOT_CODE_0__ 或 __ELBOT_CODE_1__，默认 __ELBOT_CODE_2__；__ELBOT_CODE_3__ 不注入工具 schema，适合不需要工具的低成本后台处理。
docs/elnis-usage.md:table:226a892571e4cb.translation: LLM background Session mode: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ or __ELBOT_CODE_1__, default __ELBOT_CODE_2__; __ELBOT_CODE_3__ does not inject tool schema, suitable for low-cost background processing that does not require tools.

docs/elnis-usage.md:table:2cb9d988869c02.source: Elwisp 随事件声明的外部工具；默认允许，命中该 Elwisp 的 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 时拒绝。
docs/elnis-usage.md:table:2cb9d988869c02.translation: External tools declared by Elwisp with events; allowed by default, rejected when hitting the __ELBOT_CODE_0__ of that Elwisp.

docs/elnis-usage.md:table:2da44f750570a9.source: Elwisp 标签，用于日志和统计。
docs/elnis-usage.md:table:2da44f750570a9.translation: Elwisp tag, used for logs and statistics.

docs/elnis-usage.md:table:2fb33550734c99.translation: Unique event ID within the source.

docs/elnis-usage.md:table:40e396c8617fd4.source: direct 请求只有 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 且没有 __ELBOT_CODE_1__/__ELBOT_CODE_2__ 时只执行 API，不发送消息。
docs/elnis-usage.md:table:40e396c8617fd4.translation: When a direct request only has __ELBOT_CODE_0__ and lacks __ELBOT_CODE_1__/__ELBOT_CODE_2__, it only executes the API and does not send a message.

docs/elnis-usage.md:table:46bff1a1c1be11.source: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 透传平台原始 API，__ELBOT_CODE_1__ 使用统一能力名；
docs/elnis-usage.md:table:46bff1a1c1be11.translation: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ passes through the platform's original API, while __ELBOT_CODE_1__ uses a unified capability name;

docs/elnis-usage.md:table:5df1524716e01f.translation: The first batch of capabilities includes __ELBOT_CODE_0__, __ELBOT_CODE_1__, and __ELBOT_CODE_2__.

docs/elnis-usage.md:table:6a72a3285b0a6b.source: 后台任务预加载的 ElBot 内部工具名或 Skill 名；
docs/elnis-usage.md:table:6a72a3285b0a6b.translation: The ElBot internal tool name or Skill name preloaded for background tasks;

docs/elnis-usage.md:table:7089fc7221c896.source: 普通工具注入 schema，Skill 注入任务说明并自动注入对应 runner；
docs/elnis-usage.md:table:7089fc7221c896.translation: Ordinary tools inject the schema, while Skills inject task descriptions and automatically inject the corresponding runner;

docs/elnis-usage.md:table:79bb2ed09cd5e0.source: 文件名，用于下载保存和展示。
docs/elnis-usage.md:table:79bb2ed09cd5e0.translation: File name, used for downloading, saving, and displaying.

docs/elnis-usage.md:table:83a2d771154360.source: 外部事件发生时间；缺失时使用接收时间。
docs/elnis-usage.md:table:83a2d771154360.translation: Occurrence time of the external event; the reception time is used if missing.

docs/elnis-usage.md:table:852eac6691046a.source: 原始补充数据，只做记录和 prompt 附加。
docs/elnis-usage.md:table:852eac6691046a.translation: Original supplementary data, used only for recording and prompt attachment.

docs/elnis-usage.md:table:b9b16d252007ed.source: 事件标题，用于通知和后台 Session 标题。
docs/elnis-usage.md:table:b9b16d252007ed.translation: Event title, used for notifications and background Session titles.

docs/elnis-usage.md:table:d1eef39ef655cc.source: LLM 模式必填，推荐使用 ELyph Task Notation（任务表示法）__ELBOT_CODE_0__；
docs/elnis-usage.md:table:d1eef39ef655cc.translation: Required for LLM mode; it is recommended to use ELyph Task Notation __ELBOT_CODE_0__;

docs/elnis-usage.md:table:e3b263ee01e2d8.translation: Plain text content, not persisted to disk.

docs/elnis-usage.md:table:e45776f2e59354.source: Elwisp 期望投递目标数组，__ELBOT_CODE_0__ 表示发给平台超级管理员，__ELBOT_CODE_1__ 且带 __ELBOT_CODE_2__ 时发指定私聊/群聊，__ELBOT_CODE_3__ 表示所有已启用平台超级管理员。
docs/elnis-usage.md:table:e45776f2e59354.translation: Elwisp expects a delivery target array: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ indicates sending to the platform superadmin, __ELBOT_CODE_1__ with __ELBOT_CODE_2__ indicates sending to a specified private chat/group chat, and __ELBOT_CODE_3__ indicates all enabled platform superadmins.

docs/elnis-usage.md:table:f094dbde8ffe18.source: 必须在 Elnis __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 裁决范围内，__ELBOT_CODE_1__ 会被忽略。
docs/elnis-usage.md:table:f094dbde8ffe18.translation: Must be within the Elnis __ELBOT_CODE_0__ adjudication range; __ELBOT_CODE_1__ will be ignored.
